title: Section 7H
content: An appeal shall lie within such time and in such manner as may be prescribed by rules to the 1[Election Commission] from any order of the electoral registration officer under section 7F or section 7G.
footnote: 1. Subs. by Act 67 of 1993, s. 14, for "Director of Municipal Elections" (w.e.f. 1-10-1993
